# Protein Melody Player

> Interactive web app that maps amino acid sequences to music and supports sequence alignment.

## Project URL
- https://proteinplayer.com/

## Important Pages
- Home app: https://proteinplayer.com/
- Sequence aligner: https://proteinplayer.com/align.html
- Source code: https://github.com/tlingf/amino-acid-to-song

## What This Project Does
- Converts one-letter amino acid sequences into musical melodies.
- Supports multiple amino acid-to-note mapping strategies.
- Includes harmony mode based on known protein binding contacts.
- Provides compose mode with next-residue suggestions from bigram statistics.
- Supports folding composed sequences with ESMFold and viewing structures in 3D.
- Includes browser-based Needleman-Wunsch global sequence alignment.

## Tech Summary
- Static site (HTML/CSS/Vanilla JavaScript)
- Web Audio API for synthesis
- 3Dmol.js for molecular visualization
- ESMFold API for structure prediction

## Canonical Documentation
- README: https://github.com/tlingf/amino-acid-to-song/blob/main/README.md
